title: Oscars 2026: The best jokes from Conan O’Brien’s monologue
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Conan O'Brien returned as host for the Oscars 2026, delivering a self-effacing and high-energy monologue.
O'Brien's jokes targeted Netflix and Timothee Chalamet, featuring humorous pre-taped sketches and visual segments.
Jimmy Kimmel contributed politically charged humor while presenting awards, referencing free speech and CBS.

title: Fundraiser: Community remembers Danvers mother, nurse killed in her home
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Janet Swallow, 68, a Danvers nurse, was allegedly killed by 18-year-old Anthony DeMayo in her home.
DeMayo, a Bishop Fenwick High School student, is charged with murder after admitting to the killing.
A GoFundMe for Swallow's family has raised nearly $50,000 towards a $65,000 goal to support them.

title: Northeastern women’s hockey advances to Frozen Four after defeating Minnesota
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Northeastern women's hockey defeated Minnesota 4-2 to advance to the Frozen Four for the fourth time.
Goaltender Lisa Jönsson made 45 saves in the victory, with four different Huskies players scoring goals.
Northeastern will face No. 1 Ohio State in the Frozen Four at Penn State on March 20.

title: Bomb threat reportedly halts plane at Logan ‘for hours’ before being deemed ‘not credible’
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A bomb threat delayed a JetBlue flight to Florida at Boston Logan Airport for hours on Saturday.
State Police deemed the bomb threat not credible after FBI agents and bomb sniffing dogs searched the plane.
Authorities have opened an investigation, but no arrests have been made regarding the hoax threat.

title: 17 arrested during St. Patrick’s Day parade in South Boston, police say
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Seventeen people were arrested at South Boston's St. Patrick's Day parade for public drinking violations.
Boston police and MBTA Transit Police confiscated dozens of 'borgs' and other alcoholic beverages during the parade.
Residents reported issues like underage drinking and public indecency, leading to multiple calls to city officials.

title: 2026 Oscars: Full list of winners (updating live)
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'One Battle After Another' wins Best Picture and five other awards including Best Director at the 2026 Oscars.
'Sinners' garners four Oscars, with Michael B. Jordan winning Best Actor and other wins in writing, score, and cinematography.
'KPop Demon Hunters' wins Best Animated Feature; 'Frankenstein' secures awards in production design, costume design, and makeup.

title: Oscars red carpet: See the best Academy Awards fashion
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Conan O'Brien hosts the 2026 Oscars at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles for the second consecutive year.
Nominees Kate Hudson, Timothee Chalamet, and Elle Fanning showcase fashion on the Oscars red carpet.
Celebrities including Leonardo DiCaprio, Steven Spielberg, and Nicole Kidman attend the 98th Academy Awards.

title: All the way from Indonesia, she’s running the Boston Marathon for people with visual impairments
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Fransisca Miraningtyas from Jakarta, Indonesia, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support individuals with visual impairments.
Miraningtyas, 46, has pterygium and has undergone surgery; her experience fuels her advocacy for accessible eye care.
Her workplace covers her surgery costs, highlighting disparities in access to vision-restoring treatments she aims to address.

title: 5 takeaways from the Revolution’s 6-1 dismantling of FC Cincinnati
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Revolution defeated FC Cincinnati 6-1, tying a club record for goals in a single MLS regular season game.
Brayan Ceballos scored two goals from corner kicks, contributing to New England's strong set piece performance.
Diego Fagundez returned to the Revolution, after leaving in 2020, and provided a secondary assist in the match.

title: Man dies after kayak overturns off Cape Cod
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: A 22-year-old man died after his kayak overturned off Wellfleet, Cape Cod, Saturday evening.
Emergency crews, including the Coast Guard, conducted a nearly two-hour search before locating the man.
The man was found in critical condition and later pronounced dead at Cape Cod Hospital.
